description: A horizontal infographic on a white background, in the form of a line chart. The title in bold black uppercase reads 'INTEL STOCK CUMULATIVE TOTAL RETURN SINCE JAN. 2, 2025'. A single red line rises to a peak labeled in red text '496.5%' at the right end. The y-axis is labeled in percentages (0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500%) and the x-axis shows date gridlines: 'JANUARY 2, 2025', 'JULY 1, 2025', 'JANUARY 1, 2026', 'MAY 12, 2026'. A black annotation with a downward arrow points to a mid-2025 point on the line: 'AUG. 22, 2025 - THE U.S. GOVERNMENT SECURES A 10% STAKE IN INTEL'. No agency seal is visible.
notable_text: INTEL STOCK CUMULATIVE TOTAL RETURN SINCE JAN. 2, 2025; 496.5%; AUG. 22, 2025 THE U.S. GOVERNMENT SECURES A 10% STAKE IN INTEL
